CE1.justification: Did the capture without asking the user to revisit prior context or restate the pattern.

CE2.justification: Reply itself is reasonably compact, but it stretches into evidentiary-hardening commentary the user didn't ask for.

CE3.justification: Confirms the entry landed in observations.md with the provenance framing, but doesn't say in-band why that file vs. another register.

CE4.justification: One committed append; no orphan or partial artifact to clean up on interruption.
